title: festuca geniculata subsp. longiglumis
intro: Festuca geniculata subsp. longiglumis is a sub-species of the Festuca geniculata grass, commonly known as bent or cranesbill. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Festuca geniculata subsp. longiglumis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
